---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<!-- FLEXBOX HERO BANNER (REPLACES THE GRID) -->
::: {.column-screen .hero-banner-flex}

<!-- Left Side Image -->
::: {.hero-img-side}
![](images/bannerNew.jpg){.hero-capsule-img alt="Geospatial Data Visual"}
:::

<!-- Right Side Text Container -->
::: {.hero-text-side}
# Bridging the gap between data and discovery with Prime Geospatial

Geospatial technology provides access to data from layers of site-specific and remote sensing arrays. We harness this data to bring deep analytical precision to your workflows, combat environmental fragmentation, and engineer reproducible data pipelines.
:::

:::



<!-- HEADER SECTION -->
::: {.column-page .content-start-section}

# &rarr; What We Offer {.section-main-heading}

:::


::: {.page-columns .page-full}

<!-- SECTION 1: GEOSPATIAL CONSULTING (Text Left, Image Right) -->
::: {.column-page .grid style="padding-bottom: 2rem; margin-top: -1.5rem; align-items: center;"}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<h2 style="font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #000000; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Geospatial Consulting</h2>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">We offer tailored strategies for site-specific and regional environmental challenges while aligning data frameworks with your core technical objectives.</p>

::: {.service-list style="font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
* Landscape Analysis: Assessing spatial patterns and environmental change over time. 
* Environmental Risk Assessment: Leveraging spatial intelligence to mitigate operational risks. 
* Project Strategy: Integration geospatial technology into your existing workflows.
:::

<a href="geospatial.qmd" class="btn-spark">Learn More</a>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<img src="images/GeospatialConsulting.png" class="img-fluid spark-card-img" alt="Geospatial Consulting">
:::

:::

<!-- SECTION 2: DATA CLEANING (Image Left, Text Right) -->
::: {.column-page .grid style="padding-bottom: 2rem; align-items: center;"}

<!-- This column uses order utilities so that on mobile text stays on top, but on desktop it moves right -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .order-last .order-md-first}
<img src="images/DataCleaning.png" class="img-fluid spark-card-img" alt="Data Collection, Cleaning & Preprocessing">
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<h2 style="font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #000000; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Data Collection, Cleaning & Preprocessing</h2>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Spatial data is only as good as its foundation. We build automated QA/QC workflows to fix messy coordinates, handle projection shifts, validate topology, and ensure your datasets are completely robust and analysis-ready.</p>

::: {.service-list style="font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
* Data Integration: Merging disparate spatial and non-spatial environmental datasets.
* Cleaning & Quality Control: Systematic removal of errors, noise, and inconsistencies in spatial features.
* Preprocessing Pipelines: Developing reproducible workflows for automated data preparation.

:::

<a href="data-cleaning.qmd" class="btn-spark">Learn More</a>
:::

:::

<!-- SECTION 3: ANALYTICAL SUPPORT (Text Left, Image Right) -->
::: {.column-page .grid style="padding-bottom: 2rem; align-items: center;"}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<h2 style="font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #000000; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Analytical Support</h2>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Beyond data preparation, we offer deep-dive analytical services for specialized research.</p>

::: {.service-list style="font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
* Statistical Modeling: Building custom models to address unique ecological questions.
* Visualization: Creating high-impact, data-driven visualizations for reporting and decision-making.
* Code Review & Optimization: Refining your existing spatial scripts for speed, scalability, and reproducibility.

:::

<a href="analytical-support.qmd" class="btn-spark">Learn More</a>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<img src="images/AnalyticalSupport.png" class="img-fluid spark-card-img" alt="Analytical Support">
:::

:::

<!-- SECTION 4: PROFESSIONAL TRAINING (Image Left, Text Right) -->
::: {.column-page .grid style="padding-bottom: 2rem; align-items: center;"}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .order-last .order-md-first}
<img src="images/Training.png" class="img-fluid spark-card-img" alt="Professional Training & Capacity Building">
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<h2 style="font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #000000; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Professional Training & Capacity Building</h2>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">We empower your team to handle complex spatial challenges with confidence. Through targeted workshops and curated technical materials, we help transfer advanced spatial skills directly to your internal workflows.</p>

::: {.service-list style="font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
* Spatial Statistics: Hands-on workshops covering modern methods for point pattern analysis, spatial regression, and interpolation.
* Ecological Modeling: Technical courses on predictive modeling, habitat suitability, and species distribution.
* Geospatial Application: Custom training in R/Python for GIS, advanced raster analysis, and automated mapping.

:::

<a href="training-capacity-building.qmd" class="btn-spark">Learn More</a>
:::

:::

:::

<!-- FULL-WIDTH CONTACT FOOTER -->
::: {.column-screen .footer-banner-dark}
::: {.container style="text-align: center;"}
<h3 style="font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; color: #ffffff;">Have a specific project in mind?</h3>
<a href="contact.qmd" class="btn-spark-light" style="padding: 0.75rem 3rem;">Contact Us</a>
:::
:::
